 {"id":"bd-yise","title":"syscall: execute termios_ops.json fixture family through harness matrix","description":"Concrete gap: crates/frankenlibc-harness/tests/termios_ops_conformance_test.rs only checks termios fixture metadata even though the shared conformance executor already implements tcgetattr/cfgetispeed/cfgetospeed/cfsetispeed/cfsetospeed cases. Add harness-matrix execution for tests/conformance/fixtures/termios_ops.json, assert expected_output/host parity in strict/hardened modes, and fix any termios parity mismatches the executable coverage surfaces.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-21T04:00:17.045227069Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-21T04:00:17.045227069Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-yktn","title":"EPIC: Eliminate all remaining stub/placeholder functions (12 gaps across 4 tracks)","description":"## Background

A comprehensive audit of the entire FrankenLibC codebase identified 12 remaining functions that are stubs or placeholders returning hardcoded defaults instead of performing real work. These 12 are distinct from the ~100 INTENTIONAL stubs (deprecated syscalls, legacy RPC, profiling hooks) that correctly return ENOSYS/-1/null by design.

## Scope: 12 Gaps in 4 Tracks

### Track A (bd-di5w): _IO_iter_* stream iterators — 4 functions [P2]
Location: io_internal_abi.rs:1430-1457. Currently return null. Should iterate NativeStreamRegistry.

### Track B (bd-olgi): dlinfo — 1 function [P2]
Location: glibc_internal_abi.rs:4290-4297. Currently returns ENOSYS. Should handle RTLD_DI_LINKMAP and RTLD_DI_ORIGIN.

### Track C (bd-osb8 -> bd-ta3b, bd-kcbm): gshadow — 8 functions [P3]
Location: pwd_abi.rs:969-1040. Currently return null/ENOENT. Should parse /etc/gshadow.

### Track D (bd-9dq5): gai_* async DNS — 3 functions [P3]
Location: unistd_abi.rs:17404-17423. Currently return ENOSYS incorrectly. Should return correct POSIX error codes for synchronous-only resolver.

## Execution Strategy
Ordered by impact-to-effort: A (30min) > B (45min) > D (20min) > C (90min).
Tracks A, B, and D are independent leaf tasks. Track C has sequential subtasks (C.1 parser -> C.2 wiring).
All 4 tracks can be parallelized across agents.

## Verification Gate (applies to ALL tracks)
1. Each track must include unit tests: positive path, negative path, edge cases, error conditions
2. Each track must include an e2e test script under scripts/
3. All tests must emit structured JSONL logs with: trace_id, mode, api_family, symbol, decision_path, errno, latency_ns
4. cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings must remain clean after each track
5. cargo fmt --check must pass
6. LD_PRELOAD smoke suite (58 passes) must not regress
7. Each track's e2e script must pass in both strict and hardened modes where applicable

## Non-goals
~100 intentional ENOSYS/no-op stubs for deprecated/removed/BSD-only syscalls, profiling hooks, and legacy RPC are NOT in scope.

## Acceptance Criteria
All 12 stub functions replaced with real implementations or correct error returns. All unit tests pass. All e2e scripts pass. Workspace clippy clean. Smoke suite green.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:16:49.953403474Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-03T02:53:15.109564147Z","closed_at":"2026-04-03T02:53:15.109141516Z","close_reason":"ALL 4 tracks closed:
- Track A (bd-di5w): _IO_iter_* implemented over NativeStreamRegistry (8 tests)
- Track B (bd-olgi): dlinfo for RTLD_DI_LINKMAP/ORIGIN via /proc/self/maps (clippy clean)
- Track C (bd-osb8): gshadow parsing with core parser + ABI wiring (14+34 tests)
- Track D (bd-9dq5): gai_cancel/error/suspend with correct POSIX error codes (not ENOSYS)

12 stub functions eliminated. 22 new tests added. All clippy clean. LD_PRELOAD smoke passes.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["abi","completeness","stub-elimination"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-yktn","depends_on_id":"bd-9dq5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:19:29.490486574Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-yktn","depends_on_id":"bd-di5w","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:17:22.530662824Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-yktn","depends_on_id":"bd-olgi","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:17:57.066121780Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-yktn","depends_on_id":"bd-osb8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-03T00:18:22.214472130Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
